description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back wings, and two large turbofan engines mounted under the wings. The wings are low-mounted with noticeable upward-angled winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. The nose is rounded and houses a multi-window cockpit, while the main cabin windows are arranged in a linear row along the fuselage. The tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The exterior is smooth and predominantly white, typical of commercial passenger aircraft.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet airliner with swept-back low wings, underwing turbofan engines, and a conventional tail. The fuselage is streamlined with a multi-window cockpit and linear cabin windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, cockpit windows, and the wide wingspan with upward-angled winglets and underwing engines.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, row of cabin windows, low-mounted swept wings, and the conventional tail structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile mirroring view 1, showing the other side of the fuselage, wings, and engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear, with two main gear units and one nose gear (not visibly extended in images)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage
